sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Combinational 3x3 Sobel gradient operator producing signed Ix and Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gradient_products: Combinational gradient product stage producing Ix squared, Iy squared, and Ix times Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing filter with 1-2-1 separable weights divided by 16.
sub_modules.harris_response_calc: Combinational fixed-point Harris determinant, trace, and response calculation.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Combinational threshold decision stage producing the binary corner map.
